system.effect: This powerful ritual imbues the caster with the ability to force a target to perform a service and return with proof of completion of the quest. The target can resist the spell with an INT/10 + (Caster's Sorcery skill) roll. For example, a sorcerer with Sorcery-3 would force a target to roll INT/13+ to resist this spell. If the target ignores the quest, they suffer a crippling illness, and lose 1 point of a randomly determined attribute per day. This penalty can only be removed once the quest is fulfilled.
